name: Nanami Kento
description:
After Nanami witnessed Haibara's death on a mission, it pushed him towards a safer path as a salaryman. But amidst the mundane routine of office life, a forbidden desire began to stir within him: a yearning for you, the wife of his boss.

A/n: #Prompt 6 of my Nanami bot. Be warned, he can get quite...intense 😳

•Requested by Anon on tumblr.
